verdict.answer_first: Both lead with the actionable answer: A "pnpm." / B "pnpm."
verdict.decisiveness: A is slightly stronger because it closes with one prescription: "Start with pnpm + Turborepo"; B says "common pairing" which is softer.
verdict.fabrication: Both use unsupported market claims; B is worse: "de facto standard now" and "ecosystem momentum is clearly there."
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on because it gives starter files: "pnpm-workspace.yaml" and root "package.json" snippets.
